properties.name: spring.ai.mcp.client.streamable-http.connections.*.url
properties.description: Base URL (scheme, host, port only) for Streamable HTTP MCP. Example: http://localhost:5678

properties.name: spring.ai.mcp.client.streamable-http.connections.*.endpoint
properties.description: MCP path on that host (e.g. /mcp-server/http for n8n instance-level MCP).
